# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
  - name: service1
    url: http://service1.example.com
    tags:
      - api-gateway
  - name: service2
    url: http://service2.example.com
    tags:
      - api-gateway

routes:
  - name: route-service1
    paths:
      - /api/service1/*
    service: service1
    strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add_headers:
            X-Service: Service1
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50
          hour: 2000

  - name: route-service2
    paths:
      - /api/service2/*
    service: service2
    strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add_headers:
            X-Service: Service2
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50
          hour: 2000

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "*"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
